common.networkError: Network error. Please check your internet connection.
common.savingSuccess: Your responses have been saved successfully!
common.submitError: An error occurred while submitting. Please try again.
common.missingProgramId: Program ID is missing. Cannot submit questionnaire.

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Sign in to begin
login.linkSent: A sign-in link has been sent to {email}

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.description: Have you already used the D4L Collect Mobile-App?

recovery.title: Enter Passphrase
recovery.description: Please enter your passphrase to restore your data.
recovery.label: Your Passphrase
recovery.invalidMnemonic: Invalid passphrase. Please verify the words and the selected language.
recovery.noticeSummary: Your study enrollments cannot be recovered automatically.
recovery.noticeDetails: Your encrypted study data will be fully recovered. For security reasons, your active study enrollments cannot be transferred automatically. You will need to manually re-enroll in your studies after logging in.

onboarding.errorSetup: Account setup failed. Please try again later.

dashboard.title: My Studies
dashboard.noProgramsDescription:
You are currently not enrolled in any studies.

If you just recovered your account, you will need to manually re-enroll in your studies.

program.noTasks: No tasks available at this time
program.noConsents: No consents accepted for this study
program.noSubmissions: No submissions for this study yet
program.consentRevokeWarning: Revoking consent will permanently delete all your submitted answers for this study.
program.consentDeclineWarning: Declining this required consent will prevent you from proceeding with the study.
program.withdrawWarning: Withdrawing from the study will not delete your data. Revoke your consent, if you want to delete all data.
program.programErrorTitle: There was an error loading the study.
program.programEndedText: This study has ended and no further questionnaires can be submitted.
program.contactTeam: If you believe something needs to be corrected, please contact the research team or the Data4Life team at we@data4life.help.

questionnaire.questionnaireErrorTitle: There was an error loading the questionnaire.
questionnaire.readonlyBannerBody: This submission can no longer be edited because the allowed time window for editing has passed.

validation.dateMin: Date must be on or after {min}
validation.dateMax: Date must be on or before {max}

settings.title: Privacy Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your data and account
settings.yourDataDescription: We store the following data associated with your account:
settings.profileInfoDescription: Name, email address, and profile picture
settings.questionnaireResponsesDescription: All answers you have submitted to questionnaires
settings.consentRecordsDescription: Records of consents you have accepted or declined
settings.linkedAccountsDescription: Information about linked login providers (e.g., Google)
settings.exportDescription: Download a copy of all your personal data in JSON format. This includes your profile, all questionnaire responses, and consent records.
settings.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteWarning: Warning: This will immediately and permanently delete all your data.
settings.deleteModalIntro: This action is permanent and irreversible. All your data will be deleted, including:
settings.recoveryKeyDescription: Use this key to log in to your account on a mobile device.
settings.pleaseCompleteOnboarding: Please complete the onboarding setup to generate your recovery key.
settings.notificationsDescription: Choose whether to receive email reminders for upcoming and available questionnaires. Turn them off globally or for individual studies.
settings.notificationsGlobalOffHint: Notifications are turned off globally. Turn them back on to manage individual studies.

generic.subject: New questionnaire available
generic.title: New Questionnaire Available
generic.body: A new questionnaire has been assigned to you and is ready to be completed.
generic.footer: You are receiving this email because you are enrolled in an active study.

search.title: Join a Study
search.noPublicPrograms: No public studies are currently available.
search.searchErrorNotFound: No program found with that identifier.
search.searchErrorServer: Something went wrong. Please try again.

unsubscribe.title: Reminders updated
unsubscribe.invalidToken: This unsubscribe link is invalid or expired. Please sign in and manage your preferences in Settings.
unsubscribe.stateOffProgram: You won't receive reminder emails for <bold>{programTitle}</bold>.
unsubscribe.unsubscribedAll: All study reminders are off. Manage these in Settings.
unsubscribe.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
